---
format: html
---

## BioHUG

Welcome to the BioHUG project at the Hôpitaux Universitaires de Genève (HUG). This site provides information for patients and researchers. ---

```{r}
#| echo: false
1 + 1
```

You can add options to executable code like this

```{r}
#| echo: false
2 * 2
```

The `echo: false` option disables the printing of code (only output is displayed).
